quicksight.dashboard.donutoptions.CfnAbo: The options for configuring a donut chart or pie chart.

quicksight.dashboard.donutoptions.ArcOpt.Description: The option for define the arc of the chart shape. Valid values are as follows:  +  `WHOLE` - A pie chart+  `SMALL`- A small-sized donut chart+  `MEDIUM`- A medium-sized donut chart+  `LARGE`- A large-sized donut chart

quicksight.dashboard.donutoptions.DonutC.Description: The label options of the label that is displayed in the center of a donut chart. This option isn't available for pie charts.
